finding: Homepage English mode still has several hard-coded Chinese or mixed-language helper panels before project data replaces the fallback list.
impact: English readers can use the core search, filters, map and list, but supporting guidance is not fully localized.
recommended_fix: Add data-static translation hooks to the homepage helper panels, map note, fallback list and data reach label.
Add a small static copy patch that follows the existing language toggle and does not delay the first view.
Keep OpenStreetMap attribution visible and avoid changing the basemap or data loading path.
notes: No unverified candidate project was promoted into the active homepage dataset.
